description: Patient-initiated scheduling with full business rule enforcement: patient overlap (RN01), cross-clinic interval (RN04), auto-confirm (RN06), and patient cancellation with minimum notice (RN08).

prompts.name: patient-appointment-dto
prompts.description: Create the patient-specific appointment creation DTO (no patientId — taken from JWT)

prompts.name: appointments-service-extensions
prompts.description: Add createForPatient, cancelAsPatient, and the three private validation helpers (RN01, RN04, slot match)
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, READ the existing apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.service.ts carefully — preserve all existing methods (create, findAll, findById, update, updateStatus, cancel, checkConflict). Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

The following already exist — import them, do NOT recreate them:
- AvailabilityService at apps/api/src/availability/availability.service.ts
- ProfessionalsService at apps/api/src/professionals/professionals.service.ts
- ClinicsService at apps/api/src/clinics/clinics.service.ts
- AppointmentStatus enum at apps/api/src/appointments/schemas/appointment.schema.ts
- ForbiddenException, BadRequestException, ConflictException from '@nestjs/common'

1. Update the constructor to also inject:
   - private readonly availabilityService: AvailabilityService
   - private readonly professionalsService: ProfessionalsService
   - private readonly clinicsService: ClinicsService

2. Add three private helper methods:

   private async checkPatientOverlap(patientId: string, startAt: Date, endAt: Date): Promise<void>
   - find one appointment where:
     - patientId = ObjectId(patientId)
     - status NOT IN [CANCELLED]
     - startAt < endAt AND endAt > startAt (overlap condition)
   - if found, throw ConflictException('You already have an appointment overlapping this time slot')

   private async checkCrossClinicInterval(patientId: string, clinicId: string, startAt: Date, endAt: Date): Promise<void>
   - intervalMs = 30 * 60_000
   - windowStart = new Date(startAt - intervalMs); windowEnd = new Date(endAt + intervalMs)
   - find one appointment where:
     - patientId = ObjectId(patientId)
     - clinicId NOT EQUAL to ObjectId(clinicId)
     - status NOT IN [CANCELLED]
     - startAt < windowEnd AND endAt > windowStart
   - if found, throw ConflictException('You already have an appointment at another clinic within 30 minutes of this time')

   private async validateAgainstAvailability(professionalId: string, startAt: Date, endAt: Date): Promise<void>
   - dateStr = startAt.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
   - slots = await this.availabilityService.getAvailableSlots(professionalId, { fromDate: dateStr, toDate: dateStr })
   - matches = slots.some(s => s.startAt.getTime() === startAt.getTime() && s.endAt.getTime() === endAt.getTime())
   - if (!matches) throw BadRequestException('Selected time does not match an available slot')

3. Update the EXISTING create() method to ALSO call the new validators after the existing checkConflict call:
   - await this.checkPatientOverlap(dto.patientId, startAt, endAt)
   - await this.checkCrossClinicInterval(dto.patientId, dto.clinicId, startAt, endAt)
   - await this.validateAgainstAvailability(dto.professionalId, startAt, endAt)
   - Then determine initial status using autoConfirm:
     - const provider = await this.professionalsService.findById(dto.professionalId)
     - const clinic = await this.clinicsService.findById(dto.clinicId)
     - const autoConfirm = provider.autoConfirm || clinic.autoConfirm
     - const status = autoConfirm ? AppointmentStatus.CONFIRMED : AppointmentStatus.SCHEDULED
   - Use this status when creating the document instead of relying on the schema default

4. Add new method: async createForPatient(dto: CreatePatientAppointmentDto, patientUserId: string): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
   - const startAt = new Date(dto.startAt)
   - const endAt = new Date(startAt.getTime() + dto.durationMinutes * 60_000)
   - await this.checkConflict(dto.professionalId, startAt, endAt)
   - await this.checkPatientOverlap(patientUserId, startAt, endAt)
   - await this.checkCrossClinicInterval(patientUserId, dto.clinicId, startAt, endAt)
   - await this.validateAgainstAvailability(dto.professionalId, startAt, endAt)
   - const provider = await this.professionalsService.findById(dto.professionalId)
   - const clinic = await this.clinicsService.findById(dto.clinicId)
   - const autoConfirm = provider.autoConfirm || clinic.autoConfirm
   - const status = autoConfirm ? AppointmentStatus.CONFIRMED : AppointmentStatus.SCHEDULED
   - return this.appointmentModel.create({ ...dto, patientId: patientUserId, endAt, status })

5. Add new method: async cancelAsPatient(appointmentId: string, patientUserId: string): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
   - const appointment = await this.findById(appointmentId) — uses existing method
   - if (appointment.patientId.toString() !== patientUserId) throw new ForbiddenException('You can only cancel your own appointments')
   - if status is CANCELLED or COMPLETED, throw new BadRequestException(`Cannot cancel an appointment in status ${appointment.status}`)
   - const provider = await this.professionalsService.findById(appointment.professionalId.toString())
   - const minNotice = provider.minCancelNoticeHours
   - const hoursUntilStart = (appointment.startAt.getTime() - Date.now()) / 3_600_000
   - if (hoursUntilStart < minNotice) throw new BadRequestException(`Cancellation requires at least ${minNotice} hours notice. Only ${hoursUntilStart.toFixed(1)} hours remain.`)
   - appointment.status = AppointmentStatus.CANCELLED
   - return appointment.save()

prompts.name: appointments-controller-patient-endpoints
prompts.description: Add POST /appointments/book and PATCH /:id/cancel-as-patient endpoints for PATIENT role

prompts.name: appointments-module-update
prompts.description: Wire AvailabilityModule, ProfessionalsModule and ClinicsModule into AppointmentsModule
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing file. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Update apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.module.ts:
- Import AvailabilityModule from '../availability/availability.module'
- Import ProfessionalsModule from '../professionals/professionals.module'
- Import ClinicsModule from '../clinics/clinics.module'
- Add the three modules to the imports array of @Module()

If there is a circular dependency risk (e.g. availability module ALREADY imports appointments module for slot computation), use forwardRef:
- forwardRef(() => AvailabilityModule)
- and on the other side, also use forwardRef(() => AppointmentsModule)

Do not change providers, controllers, or exports arrays.

prompts.name: appointments-tests-extension
prompts.description: Add 12 new tests covering patient creation, cancellation and the three new business rules
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, READ the existing file and PRESERVE all existing tests. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

The service constructor now injects AvailabilityService, ProfessionalsService, and ClinicsService — make sure to provide mocks for these in the TestingModule setup. The mock for availabilityService.getAvailableSlots should return slots that match the test inputs (so that validateAgainstAvailability passes by default; tests that need it to fail should override this mock for that specific case).

Mock professionalsService.findById to return { autoConfirm: false, minCancelNoticeHours: 24 } by default.
Mock clinicsService.findById to return { autoConfirm: false } by default.

Add these new tests inside the existing describe('AppointmentsService') block:

1. 'createForPatient — success with autoConfirm=false sets status=SCHEDULED'
2. 'createForPatient — success with autoConfirm=true sets status=CONFIRMED' (override professional mock)
3. 'createForPatient — patient overlap throws ConflictException' (mock appointmentModel.findOne to return existing overlapping appointment)
4. 'createForPatient — cross-clinic <30min throws ConflictException'
5. 'createForPatient — cross-clinic >=30min succeeds' (boundary case: exactly 30 min apart should succeed)
6. 'createForPatient — slot does not match availability throws BadRequestException' (override availabilityService mock to return slots that don\'t match)
7. 'cancelAsPatient — owner cancels with enough notice succeeds' (appointment in 48h, minNotice=24)
8. 'cancelAsPatient — owner cancels with insufficient notice throws BadRequestException' (appointment in 1h, minNotice=24)
9. 'cancelAsPatient — non-owner throws ForbiddenException' (different patientId)
10. 'cancelAsPatient — already cancelled throws BadRequestException'
11. 'cancelAsPatient — already completed throws BadRequestException'
12. 'cancelAsPatient — minNoticeHours=0 always allows cancellation' (override mock with 0)

If existing tests for the create() method break because of the new validation calls (checkPatientOverlap, checkCrossClinicInterval, validateAgainstAvailability), update them to satisfy the new validators (provide mocks that pass).
